expect: S504 structural concepts have 0-2 lesson-only citations after 4 sessions. 2-4/24 ADOPTED by lesson-only count.
actual: 3/24 ADOPTED (goodhart-cascade 4, vocabulary-ceiling 5, epistemic-lock 5). 18 EMERGING. 1 DEAD (runtime-graft). 3 FALSIFIED (phloem-gradient, fork-finality, prerequisite-shadow). S504 structural concepts: 2 lesson-only citations each (EMERGING, not ADOPTED). All 3 ADOPTED are meta-diagnostic from R2 (S493). R3-R5 concepts: 0% adoption rate.
diff: Expected 2-4 ADOPTED: got exactly 3 (CONFIRMED). Expected S504 at 0-2: got 2 (CONFIRMED). Unexpected: R2 dominance (60% adoption) vs all other rounds (0%). Meta-diagnostic property is the adoption predictor, not recency.
method: lesson-only grep (L-1353 corrected). Excluded experiment JSONs, domain frontiers, self-referential files.
key_finding: Meta-diagnostic concepts (questioning evidence quality or structural limits) adopt at 60% vs 0% for descriptive labels. Later rounds show vocabulary saturation — R2 hit the conceptual sweet spot. diagnosis-repair-gap borderline at 3 citations.
closure_assessment: F-INV1 is CLOSEABLE. 24 concepts invented across 5 rounds over 16 sessions (vs 1/20 organic baseline). 3 ADOPTED at 3-5x organic speed. Falsification rate 12.5% (3/24). Key result: deliberate invention works for meta-diagnostic concepts only. Full test at S513 may not change verdict.
